name: @bpmn-react/dmn
description: DMN family for bpmn-react (Handoff 5, wheel degree 185): DRD node types and shapes (decision, inputData, knowledgeSource, businessKnowledgeModel), requirement edges (straight routing) and a DMN 1.4 XML converter. Workspace-only — the publish scope awaits pendencias.md §1. Zero runtime dependencies beyond @bpmn-react/*.

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && tsc -p tsconfig.cjs.json && node ../../scripts/write-cjs-package.mjs dist/cjs
